title: American Express (AXP) Intrinsic Value — Gemini 3.1 DCF Analysis
description: Intrinsic value analysis of American Express using a discounted cash flow (DCF) model and sensitivity analysis.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: 10.6% - Solid top-line growth. As a financial institution, American Express lacks a standard Free Cash Flow metric applicable for a traditional DCF model. Therefore, an accurate DCF cannot be reliably calculated.
